description_long: This object is a freestanding advertising board with a rectangular display mounted atop a turned wooden post, which is anchored to a square concrete base. The display case is framed in dark wood and features a printed sign titled 'Jungle Cruise' with additional text and graphics visible on the front. The post is ornately shaped, adding a decorative touch, and the base shows visible cracks, suggesting it is made of concrete or stone. The sides and back of the display case are plain, with the main content only visible from the front. The overall construction appears sturdy and designed for outdoor use, likely to withstand moderate weather conditions.
description: A freestanding advertising board with a framed sign titled 'Jungle Cruise' mounted on a decorative wooden post and a cracked concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Jungle Cruise' sign and full details of the display, post, and cracked base.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the depth of the display case and the side profile of the post and base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the display case and the full square base.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the thickness of the display case and the turned shape of the post.
attribute_mounting_type: freestanding pole-mounted on square concrete base
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with straight edges
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed sign for 'Jungle Cruise' attraction
